Story

Most AI answers well. Very little of it becomes a real counterpart.

ZAKI exists because the last mile between people and AI is continuity. It was built from a promise to never let go, keep getting better, and treat your world like it matters.

Start your next chapter Follow the build
Live today
Chat · Agent · Brain public
One memory
Visible user controlled
Language
AR · EN mixed by default
Next
Learn · Design · Career gated
01 It started as a promise

Never let go. Keep getting better. Be there when it is hard.

ZAKI started with a promise: never let go, keep getting better, and be there when things get hard.

Continuity changes the relationship.

So we built around memory first. The Brain is visible. The Agent shows its work. Spaces keep tasks clean. The product grows only when the operational truth is ready.

ZAKI is here for founders, adventurers, dreamers, and operators starting something bold, with clear gates for Learn, Design, and Career.

02 The product logic behind the brand

Why we are building it this way.

Origin

ZAKI was built from a promise

Not a corporate feature list: a promise to stick around, learn your world, and treat the thing you are building like it matters.

Gap

The real gap is continuity

Most AI still behaves like a reset button. ZAKI is built to close that last mile.

Launch

Start with structured productivity

Spaces give a disciplined workspace for bilingual daily work before the next product layer.

Memory

Persistence changes the relationship

When context carries forward, AI becomes more useful, more accountable, and more worth trusting.

Focus

Warmth still needs control

Spaces keep work organized. Memory keeps continuity useful. Visible work phases make trust practical.

Vision

The next product step

Persistent personal intelligence that behaves more like a counterpart than a one-shot tool.

03 Building in public

What shaped this release.

We publish progress and the ecosystem signals behind our decisions, so you can see where ZAKI is going and why.

LaunchDone

The Agent is live

A personal agent that plans and acts, with one persistent thread per user and visible work phases during execution.

Current release
MilestoneDone

Multi-user hardening and quotas

Stronger per-user isolation, safer streaming, and a shared weekly allowance that keeps the platform disciplined.

Current release
SignalDone

Context management matters

The industry is converging on context management for long-running agents: exactly the memory-first architecture ZAKI was built on.

Current release
NextNext

Learn and Career stay gated

Private lanes only open when entitlement, product state, memory, UI, and tests agree end to end.

Next phase
NextNext

Deeper controls

Better channel controls, stronger reliability loops, and clearer agent guardrails across the platform.

Next phase
OngoingNext

Public updates

We keep shipping and sharing as ZAKI moves from disciplined chat toward persistent intelligence.

Next phase
05 Live today. Growing in public.

We only expose what is real.

Live now

Agent · Chat & Spaces · Brain

An agent that acts, focused workspaces, and a memory you control: bilingual, on web and Telegram.

live

Learn and Career

gated
After that

Design

next

CLI, desktop, and extensions

Your move

Bring the vision; ZAKI brings the memory, the follow-through, and the quiet weight off your shoulders. Start free, then upgrade when you need more room.
